description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, slightly domed carapace and two prominent, upraised claws. The crab's exoskeleton is textured and displays a range of earthy tones, from sandy beige to reddish-brown, with subtle gradations across its body and limbs. Its eight segmented walking legs are splayed outward, each ending in pointed tips, and the claws are robust with darker, reddish tips. The underside of the crab is paler, and the joints of the legs and claws show natural articulation. The eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and the mouthparts are tucked beneath the front edge. The overall appearance is lifelike, with a hard, rough shell and detailed anatomical features typical of a true crab.
description: A lifelike crab with a broad, textured shell, two large upraised claws, and eight segmented legs, displaying earthy tones and detailed anatomical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, upraised claws, and symmetrical spread of legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height of the upraised claws and the articulation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the crab's profile, claw height, and leg segmentation.
